# Thalidomide 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Thalidomide 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Thalidomide</strong> 目前有 <strong>16 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Thalidomide 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Thalidomide BMS in combination with melphalan and prednisone as first line treatment of patients with untreated multiple myeloma, aged &gt;/= 65 years or ineligible for high dose chemotherapy....</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>ganglioneuroblastoma (disease)（99.0%）</li>
<li>vertebral anomalies and variable endocrine and T-cell dysfunction（99.0%）</li>
<li>retroperitoneal neoplasm（98.7%）</li>
<li>neuroblastoma（98.7%）</li>
<li>brachydactyly-syndactyly syndrome（94.2%）</li>
<li>colobomatous microphthalmia-rhizomelic dysplasia syndrome（93.2%）</li>
<li>rheumatoid arthritis（92.4%）</li>
<li>myeloid leukemia（90.5%）</li>
<li>indolent plasma cell myeloma（88.5%）</li>
<li>plasma cell myeloma（85.3%）</li>
<li>acute lymphoblastic leukemia (disease)（74.8%）</li>
<li>cholangiocarcinoma, susceptibility to（64.3%）</li>
<li>GCGR-related hyperglucagonemia（60.5%）</li>
<li>scalp dermatosis（59.9%）</li>
<li>congenital temporomandibular joint ankylosis（59.6%）</li>
<li>polydipsia（59.2%）</li>
<li>mitral valve prolapse, myxomatous（58.9%）</li>
<li>epidural abscess（58.0%）</li>
<li>giant cell reparative granuloma（57.0%）</li>
<li>pancreas, dorsal, agenesis of（56.9%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/thalidomide/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
